description: Default capability for the main window

permissions.comment: Allow ANY http/https URL (arbitrary host, PORT, path). tauri-plugin-http 2.5.9 matches with the `urlpattern` crate (src/scope.rs), NOT glob: `*` (not `**`) is the wildcard and the PORT is a distinct component. A constructor string without `:port` (e.g. `http://**` or `http://*`) leaves the port pattern empty, which only matches default/empty ports — so an explicit `:30002` fails. `*:*` makes the port a wildcard (also matches empty port) and the trailing `/*` (plus the plugin's pathname default-fixup) covers every path/query/hash. Verified against http://106.75.229.129:30002/v1/chat/completions.
